description_long: This handcart features a whimsical design with a pair of stylized red horse figures at the front, serving as both decorative and structural elements. The cart is constructed primarily from wood, with a rectangular open cargo area surrounded by vertical spindle-like side rails painted in a dark color. The base of the cart is flat and supported by four round wooden wheels, each attached at the corners for stability. The horses are carved with simple details and painted red with black accents, giving the cart a playful, folk-art appearance. The overall finish is matte, with visible wood grain and hand-painted details, suggesting a handcrafted origin. The open design of the cargo area allows for easy loading and unloading of small items.
description: A wooden handcart with two red horse figures at the front, spindle side rails, and four round wheels, featuring a folk-art style and open cargo area.
description_view_0: Side view showing the two red horse figures at the front, the open cargo area with dark spindle side rails, and all four wheels.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the faces of the two horse figures and the open entry to the cargo area, with the side rails visible on both sides.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the horses, side rails, and wheels from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the open cargo area and the backs of the horse figures, with the side rails framing the platform.
attribute_handle_type: none (pushed or pulled by frame or horse figures)
